summary: All reported issues have been FIXED. Tested all critical flows: Login/Dashboard, Meeting creation, Project creation, Project detail loading, Meetings list, Tasks list. All pages load without infinite loading spinners. New items appear in lists without page refresh. Backend APIs 100% passing.

issues: Browser native date pickers used instead of custom styled calendar components - minor UX consideration

critical_code_review_comments: All fixes from main agent working correctly: [ngValue]='null' fix for select elements, cleanInt() backend sanitizer, error handlers with cdr.detectChanges()
Zone.js polyfill from iteration 1 working correctly
All 4 reported bugs verified FIXED: 1) Slow loading - FIXED, 2) Cannot create meetings - FIXED, 3) Projects not appearing without refresh - FIXED, 4) Project detail infinite loading - FIXED
seed_data_creation: Created via Playwright tests: T3 Test Meeting - Playwright Automated (MTG-0003), T3 Auto Project Test (PRJ-0003), TEST_API Test Task
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 user-reported bugs have been fixed and verified. Dashboard loads instantly, Meetings page loads in ~0.1s, Project detail pages load without infinite spinner, New meetings and projects appear in lists immediately without refresh. Zone.js + ChangeDetectorRef fixes from iteration 1-2 are stable.

verified_features.login_flow: ✓ Working - admin@democorp.com / Admin@123, dashboard loads without delay
verified_features.meeting_creation: ✓ Working - Meeting created (MTG-0003), redirects to detail, visible in list without refresh
verified_features.project_creation: ✓ Working - Project created (PRJ-0003), redirects to detail without infinite loading, visible in list without refresh
verified_features.project_detail_loading: ✓ Working - PRJ-0002 detail page loads in <5s, no infinite spinner
verified_features.meetings_list_loading: ✓ Working - Loads in ~0.1s, no stuck loading state
verified_features.tasks_list_loading: ✓ Working - Task Management page loads properly, no infinite loading
verified_features.dashboard_loading: ✓ Working - Shows stats (0 tasks, 2 projects, 2 meetings), no stuck loading

rca_of_the_issues.root_cause: Two issues: 1) [value]='null' in Angular templates sent string 'null' to backend instead of JavaScript null, causing PostgreSQL integer constraint errors. 2) Missing error handlers in HTTP subscribe blocks caused infinite loading when API calls failed.
fixes_applied: Changed [value]='null' to [ngValue]='null' in all select elements (task, meeting, project forms)
Added cleanInt() sanitizer in backend to convert string 'null' to null for integer fields
Added error handlers with cdr.detectChanges() to all subscribe blocks to dismiss loading spinners on error
rca_of_the_issues.fix_verified: All fixes working correctly. Meeting and project creation successful, detail pages load without infinite spinner.
